---
title: "03. Fold：过量如何被折回稳定域"
subtitle: "Fold: How Excess Is Returned to Stability"
date: 2026-04-10
order: 3
categories: [synthesis, cultural, omega]
description: "Cross-text synthesis essay tracing `fold_is_idempotent` across 道德经、易经、黄帝内经、孙子兵法、几何原本 and the Gen 2 papers."
---

## 定理锚点 / Lean Anchors

| 角色 | 定理 |
|---|---|
| 主定理核 | `fold_is_idempotent` |
| 支撑定理 1 | `fold_fixes_stable` |
| 支撑定理 2 | `fold_is_surjective` |

## 文本导航 / Classical Works

- [道德经](../tao-te-ching/index.qmd)
- [易经](../i-ching/index.qmd)
- [孙子兵法](../sunzi/index.qmd)
- [黄帝内经](../huangdi-neijing/index.qmd)
- [几何原本](../elements/index.qmd)

## 论文导航 / Gen 2 Papers

- [Finite-Window Rigidity in Fibonacci Numeration](../../science/gen2/resolution-folding-core-symbolic-dynamics.qmd)
- [A Sharp Three-Window Threshold and Finite-Memory Conjugacy in Fibonacci Stabilization](../../science/gen2/fibonacci-stabilization-sharp-threshold-conjugacy-nonlinearity.qmd)

## NotebookLM Slides

[Download zh-primary bilingual slides (PDF)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/synthesis_03_fold_operator_slides.pdf)

## 正文 / Essay

{{< include articles/synthesis_03_fold_operator.md >}}

---

[Back to Synthesis Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
